# James DraytonHembree

Birth22 March 1827 - Pendleton District, South Carolina

Death11 Jan 1908 - Hightower, Forsyth,GA

MotherWinifred 'Winney' Gentry

FatherJames H. Hembree

Show more

Born in **Pendleton District, South Carolina** on **22 March 1827** to James H. Hembree and Winifred 'Winney' Gentry.James Drayton Hembree married Martha Ann Powers and had 11children.He passed away on **11 Jan 1908** in **Hightower, Forsyth,GA**.
